'''zhanuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetyltransferase|deacetyltransferase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetyltransferase|deacetyltransferase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhanuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhænijith|zhænijith]] || [[word:zhænijij|zhænijij]] || [[word:zhænijish|zhænijish]] || [[word:zhæniji|zhæniji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhanunujuth|zhanunujuth]] || [[word:zhanunujuj|zhanunujuj]] || [[word:zhanunujush|zhanunujush]] || [[word:zhanunuju|zhanunuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanujuth|zhanujuth]] || [[word:zhanujuj|zhanujuj]] || [[word:zhanujush|zhanujush]] || [[word:zhanuju|zhanuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanufjuth|zhanufjuth]] || [[word:zhanufjuj|zhanufjuj]] || [[word:zhanufjush|zhanufjush]] || [[word:zhanufjuf|zhanufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanujuthu|zhanujuthu]] || [[word:zhanujuju|zhanujuju]] || [[word:zhanujushu|zhanujushu]] || [[word:zhanujuku|zhanujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanujuth|zhanujuth]] || [[word:zhanujuj|zhanujuj]] || [[word:zhanujush|zhanujush]] || [[word:zhanuju|zhanuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanujuthul|zhanujuthul]] || [[word:zhanujujul|zhanujujul]] || [[word:zhanujushul|zhanujushul]] || [[word:zhanujukul|zhanujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanujuthuthu|zhanujuthuthu]] || [[word:zhanujujuju|zhanujujuju]] || [[word:zhanujushushu|zhanujushushu]] || [[word:zhanujuku|zhanujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanujuthun|zhanujuthun]] || [[word:zhanujujun|zhanujujun]] || [[word:zhanujushun|zhanujushun]] || [[word:zhanujukun|zhanujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanujuthuoro|zhanujuthuoro]] || [[word:zhanujujuoro|zhanujujuoro]] || [[word:zhanujushuoro|zhanujushuoro]] || [[word:zhanujukuoro|zhanujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
